string.text: Tactical Load-Bearing Vest

Load-bearing gear / pouch / tactical vest: functionality and practicality.
 
 %c[ui_gray_3]CHARACTERISTICS:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] used for carrying magazines
